title: fizzbuzz
goal: Create src/fizzbuzz.mjs exporting function fizzbuzz(n) returning an array for the values 1..n where a multiple of 3 is "Fizz", a multiple of 5 is "Buzz", a multiple of 15 is "FizzBuzz", and any other value is the number itself (a Number, not a string).
notes: Golden must stress: the 15 case ("FizzBuzz"), that non-multiples stay Numbers (typeof), and the array length. Pin the exact return type — this is where overfitting happens.
